testcase.name: TC10 - House for Sale listings shown and Map View renders property location correctly
testcase.system-out: Given the user is on the MagicBricks Mumbai residential page................passed When the user clicks the Buy heading........................................passed And the user clicks "House for sale in Mumbai"..............................passed And the user switches to the new tab........................................passed And the user clicks on the specific house property..........................passed And the user switches to the house detail tab...............................passed And the user scrolls down by 1500 pixels....................................passed And the user clicks About Locality tab......................................passed And the user scrolls up by 100 pixels.......................................passed And the user clicks Explore Locality........................................passed And the user switches to the locality tab...................................passed And the user clicks the map view button.....................................passed Then the map should be displayed with the property marked...................passed
